docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOAN, THUY NGOC AS TO DEFENDANT SF COLLEGE OF ACUPUNTURE,INC A CALIF CORPORATION
